hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); exit(0 if 'git push origin main' in cmd else 1)" || exit 0; cd "C:/Users/User/Phantom" && LATEST=$(gh release list --limit 1 --json tagName --repo kmdn-ch/phantom-ethical-redteam -q '.[0].tagName' 2>/dev/null || echo "v0.0.0") && MAJOR=$(echo "${LATEST#v}" | cut -d. -f1) && MINOR=$(echo "${LATEST#v}" | cut -d. -f2) && PATCH=$(echo "${LATEST#v}" | cut -d. -f3) && NEW_TAG="v${MAJOR}.${MINOR}.$((PATCH + 1))" && gh release create "$NEW_TAG" --title "$NEW_TAG" --generate-notes --repo kmdn-ch/phantom-ethical-redteam
